title: Peer-State Disability Determination Time Series, 2010–2024
description: Per-year disability determination volumes and favorable-decision rates for Massachusetts and eight population-peer states (AZ, IN, MD, MO, TN, VA, WA, WI), 2010–2024. Used to benchmark MA's favorable-rate decline against comparable states. Nested object keyed by state, then year.

columns.name: <state>
columns.description: Top-level key: two-letter state code (MA, AZ, IN, MD, MO, TN, VA, WA, WI).

columns.name: beneficiaries
columns.description: Disabled beneficiaries in payment status for the state-year.

geographic_coverage: Massachusetts + 8 population-peer states (AZ, IN, MD, MO, TN, VA, WA, WI)
license: Derived from U.S. public-domain SSA data
notes: Computed/aggregated dataset, not a raw SSA file: fav_rate and adult_fav_rate are derived ratios. Peer set chosen for population comparability with MA. See docs/methodology.md and docs/peer-states-comparison.json.
